rationale: Cited direct-assay paper explicitly reports 'little, if any, isomerase activity'; no thioredoxin fold. IDA over-interprets an essentially negative in-vitro result.
In-vitro, zinc-dependent reductase activity from one 2001 study; not physiological (cytoplasm reducing; Dsb/Trx handle disulfides). Not a core MF.
8 Cys coordinate two structural Zn(II); EXAFS PMID 8617216. Explains the CXXC motifs that drive the redox misprediction.
